title: API contract violation: get_stats returns NULL despite _Nonnull annotation
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.c:1915
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/include/lichen/meshtastic/adapter.h:292-294

The function lichen_meshtastic_adapter_get_stats is declared with _Nonnull return type:
  const struct lichen_meshtastic_adapter_stats *_Nonnull lichen_meshtastic_adapter_get_stats(...)

But the implementation returns NULL when adapter is NULL:
  return adapter == NULL ? NULL : &adapter->stats;

This violates the API contract. Callers relying on _Nonnull may not check for NULL.

Fix: Either remove the _Nonnull annotation or add an assertion/precondition check.
close_reason: fixed bug, 3 lint passes, verified no test changes
